ogTitle: Pinnaroo vs Pirie East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pinnaroo and Pirie East.
heading: Pinnaroo vs Pirie East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pinnaroo, South Australia and Pirie East, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pinnaroo has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Pirie East (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pinnaroo or Pirie East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pinnaroo has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Pirie East scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pinnaroo scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Pirie East scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pinnaroo or Pirie East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pinnaroo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
